div.head: 310. Telegram From the Embassy in India to the Department of StateSource: Kennedy Library, National Security Files, Countries Series, India, General, 7/16/63-7/19/63. Secret; Operational Immediate; Limit Distribution. Repeated to London and Rangoon.
div.p: 246. Rangoon for Ambassador Bowles Only. Embtel 245.In telegram 245 from New Delhi, July 16, Timmons reported that he had received a letter from M.J. Desai indicating that the Indian Government had decided to proceed with the proposed air defense arrangements. (Department of State, Central Files, DEF 1-4 INDIA) Herewith full text of FonSec Desai’s letter to me:
[This letter has not been declassified by the Indian Government.]
